question: Following the abduction of which Chinese individual in Thailand did scam operations gain international attention, and what traditional performance was shown entertaining audiences including potential tourists?
answer: Chinese actor Wang Xing's abduction brought international attention. A traditional lion dance performance was shown entertaining an audience that included children and adults.

video: A group of people dressed in colorful costumes perform a traditional lion dance in front of an aquarium, entertaining an audience that includes children and adults.
text: The issue gained attention after Chinese actor Wang Xing was abducted upon arriving in Thailand last month.
